3129530.name: REYNATIS - Mini Art Book
3129530.description:
"REYNATIS - Mini Art Book" is a must-have item to further enjoy the game's world. Gain exclusive insights into the game with an in-depth look at the character designs of the two protagonists, including intricate costume details and early character concepts. In addition, this Mini Art Book features illustrations with creator commentary, providing a glimpse behind the scenes and insights into the creators' thoughts.

Don't miss this chance to delve deeper into the captivating world of REYNATIS!
